summary: UI/UX Polish Testing - Frontend only. All pages load correctly with updated styling. Fixed Calendar page title from ALL CAPS to Title Case. StickPro branding, sidebar navigation, mobile responsiveness all working correctly.

tests: Login page loads with StickPro branding
User can login with test credentials
Cards display correctly with card-hover effects
StickPro logo with Stick+Pro(cyan) format visible
Navigation items have active state with left border highlight
All nav items clickable and navigate correctly
User menu at bottom of sidebar works
Title is 'Estatísticas' (Title Case, not ALL CAPS)
Stats cards show collected, pending, overdue amounts
Title changed from 'CALENDÁRIO' to 'Calendário' (Title Case) - FIXED
Mobile header with StickPro logo visible
Bottom navigation visible on mobile (Calendário, Mensagens, Membros, Estatísticas, Perfil)
All pages responsive on mobile viewport (390x844)
Stats cards display in 2-column grid on mobile
StickPro branding consistent (Stick + Pro in cyan)
Watermark present in desktop view (Activity icon)

critical_code_review_comments: ✓ All page titles now use Title Case (Estatísticas, Pagamentos, Membros, Calendário)
✓ Sidebar navigation has proper active state with left border highlight
✓ Fonts properly configured (Outfit for headings, Manrope for body)
✓ tracking-tight applied to headings for tighter letter spacing
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX Polish implementation verified. All pages use Title Case for titles. StickPro branding consistent. Mobile responsiveness working. Calendar title was fixed from ALL CAPS to Title Case during this testing session.
